response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with direct experience in AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities. His 10+ years of diverse engineering experience, open-source contributions, and process-oriented mindset (TDD, CI/CD) add significant value. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and basic German language skills in a Berlin-based role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including MCP frameworks and test infrastructure
Strong advocacy for engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews) and active open-source contributor
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in recent roles despite being a required primary stack component
Kotlin/Java experience is dated and not highlighted in current or recent positions
Basic German proficiency may limit collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
